title: Fate of the Gods

startPoint.en: Talk to Azzanadra at the World Gate, just north-west of the entrance to Arandar, south of the Eagles' Peak lodestone.
startPoint.es: Habla con Azzanadra en el World Gate, justo al noroeste de la entrada a Arandar, al sur de la piedra de viaje de Eagles' Peak.

children.title: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen…
children.matchTitle: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

children.title: Fully restore Senliten from the 'Missing My Mummy' quest
Full completion of Missing My Mummy…

recommended.name: Face mask
recommended.display: A face mask or any item that acts as one, such as masked earmuffs or a Slayer helmet (not on slayer helmet stand)

recommended.name: Ancient Magicks
recommended.display: Switch to the Ancient Magicks spell book and Ancient Curses prayer book before the quest

recommended.name: Restore potion
recommended.display: Restore potions or Overloads for dealing with nihils' stat-reducing magic

recommended.name: Mahjarrat Memories (miniquest)
recommended.display: If Mahjarrat Memories (miniquest) was completed, the fully charged engrammeter (however, it can be useful to wait until completing Fate of the Gods before completing this miniquest)

recommended.name: Traveller's necklace
recommended.display: Traveller's necklace, or activated Eagles' Peak lodestone to get to the World Gate

recommended.name: Memoriam crystal
recommended.display: 8 free inventory spaces for collecting the Memoriam crystals in the opening area of Freneskae

kills: Multiple bladed, force, and throwing muspahs (level 150)

rewards.name: Shard of Zaros
rewards.display: The Shard of Zaros, which when equipped grants protection from all factions in the God Wars Dungeon

rewards.name: Freneskae
rewards.display: Access to Freneskae via the World Gate

children.name: Bladed muspah
children.display: The ability to fight bladed, force, and throwing muspah in the Cradle

children.name: Blood nihil
children.display: The ability to fight blood, shadow, ice, and smoke nihil in the Pit

children.name: Elder Halls
children.display: Access to the Elder Halls, with a level 75 training spot

children.name: Elder energy
children.display: The ability to collect elder energy and to create portents of degradation, signs of death, and portents of death, as well as elder charm summoning pouches

rewards.name: Rune dragon
rewards.display: Access to rune dragons (requires completion of the quest Ritual of the Mahjarrat also)

postQuest.display: 75,000 experience lamp (Skill must be level 80 or higher, excludes Prayer/Summoning)

children.name: Azzanadra
children.display: Can be used up to three times, by talking to Azzanadra in the Senntisten Temple near the Altar of Zaros and choosing the fourth chat option "Zaros's return" (requires completion of The Temple at Senntisten quest)

postQuest.name: Large prismatic lamp (Fate of the Gods)
postQuest.display: A large prismatic lamp by talking to Wahisietel (Ali the Wise) in the northern most building in Nardah and choosing the third chat option "Zaros's return" (requires completion of Ritual of the Mahjarrat quest)

postQuest.name: The Annihilator
postQuest.display: The [Name] the Annihilator title, if you kill all four of the nihil while they are all attacking you at once, either during or after the quest

postQuest.name: Helm of Zaros
postQuest.display: Two cosmetic head overrides, the Helm of Zaros and Crest of Seren, after finding all the memoriam crystals on Freneskae

postQuest.name: Sixth-Age circuit
postQuest.display: A teleport to the World Gate added to the Sixth-Age circuit by speaking to the Guthixian High Druid (requires full completion of The World Wakes)
25,000 experience if a charged engrammeter is used on Freneskae, and you take less damage from environmental effects (requires completion of Mahjarrat Memories (miniquest))

postQuest.name: Empyrean Citadel
postQuest.display: If you visit the Empyrean Citadel throne room and attempt to leave, Sliske will appear and answer one question, before giving you a gift: the ability to see into the Shadow Realm without the ring of visibility (requires completion of The General's Shadow miniquest and Ritual of the Mahjarrat).
Four elder chronicles, each granting 50,000 experience when the Measure is placed:

children.name: Submerged statue
children.display: Near the submerged statue (appears as rocks if One of a Kind has not been completed) on Entrana located on the far north-west corner of the island

children.name: Oracle
children.display: Near the Oracle atop Ice Mountain

children.name: Ullek
children.display: By the archaeologist camp on the plateau at the top of the stairs in the Ruins of Ullek

text.en: combat gear and a face mask (alternatively, a masked earmuffs, or a slayer helmet not on slayer helmet stand)
Optional: Equip a ring of visibility to skip some dialogue.
text.es: Opcional: Equípate un ring of visibility para saltarte parte del diálogo. Si nunca has hablado con él antes de hacerlo, esto va más rápido.

text.en: Find the World Gate, south of the Eagles' Peak lodestone.
text.es: Encuentra el World Gate, al sur de la piedra de viaje de Eagles' Peak.

text.en: Talk to Azzanadra.
text.es: Habla con Azzanadra.

steps.caption: The glow showing when you switch to the correct symbol

text.en: Rotate the right controls near the gate until you reach .
text.es: Gira los controles de la derecha cerca de la puerta hasta llegar a 20px|link=.

text.en: Rotate left until you reach .
text.es: Gira a la izquierda hasta llegar a 20px|link=.

text.en: Rotate right until you reach .
text.es: Gira a la derecha hasta llegar a 20px|link=.

text.en: Step away from the controls, and speak to Sliske.
text.es: Aléjate de los controles y habla con Sliske.

text.en: Put on a face mask or equivalent protection to avoid taking 50 damage every 15 seconds while in Freneskae.
text.es: Ponte una face mask o protección equivalente para evitar recibir 50 de daño cada 15 segundos mientras estés en Freneskae.

text.en: Enter the World Gate to enter Freneskae.
text.es: Entra en el World Gate para acceder a Freneskae.

text.en: Run through Freneskae using the map below to reach the Sanctum. Move fast and avoid the hazards. There are healing points along the way if needed.
text.es: Recorre Freneskae usando el mapa de abajo para llegar al Sanctum. Muévete rápido y evita los peligros. Hay puntos de curación por el camino si los necesitas.

text.en: Optional: collect the memoriam crystals along the way. They are numbered on the map below; for efficiency, start with collecting number 9, then 2, 1, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8.
text.es: Opcional: recoge los memoriam crystals por el camino. Están numerados en el mapa de abajo; para mayor eficiencia, empieza recogiendo el número 9, luego el 2, 1, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8.

steps.caption: Map of Freneskae. Some red one-way indicators are inaccurate.

steps.filename: Fate of the Gods Door Puzzle 3.png
steps.caption: The solution to the final puzzle.

text.en: Optional: Deposit collected Memoriam crystals in the middle to see memories.
text.es: Opcional: Deposita los Memoriam crystals recogidos en el centro para ver los recuerdos.

text.en: Go to the north side of the room to the door puzzle.
text.es: Ve al lado norte de la sala, hacia el puzle de la puerta.

text.en: Match the symbols up together to light up the lines in between them three times to open the door, then enter.
text.es: Empareja los símbolos entre sí para iluminar las líneas que los conectan tres veces y así abrir la puerta, luego entra.

text.en: Kill the four nihils then enter the next area to the north. All nihils use a special attack after hissing. Each nihil always runs in the same direction. Therefore, a pair of nihil (ice and shadow or smoke and blood) can be killed first, leaving areas between the tracks unused and safe. Don't stand in the middle, as you might be dashed by multiple nihils at once.
text.es: Mata a los cuatro nihils y luego entra en la siguiente área al norte. Todos los nihils usan un ataque especial después de silbar. Cada nihil siempre corre en la misma dirección. Por lo tanto, se puede matar primero a una pareja de nihils (ice y shadow, o smoke y blood), dejando las áreas entre las trayectorias sin uso y seguras. No te quedes en el medio, ya que podrías ser embestido por varios nihils a la vez.

text.en: Killing the nihils while all 4 are attacking you will unlock the title and the achievement Annihilator.
text.es: Matar a los nihils mientras los 4 te están atacando a la vez desbloqueará el título y el logro Annihilator.

text.en: The smoke nihil attacks with Magic. Its special attack will decrease Attack, Strength, Magic, Ranged, and Defence by 15. Its charge will decrease these stats by 5.
text.es: El nihil de smoke ataca con Magia. Su ataque especial reduce Ataque, Fuerza, Magia, Distancia y Defensa en 15 puntos. Su embestida reduce estas estadísticas en 5 puntos.

text.en: The shadow nihil attacks with Ranged, and its special attack creates Nex-like shadow bomb at the position of player that deals rapid damage. Players should move away as soon as the floor below them is darkened by a circular spot. Shadow nihil darkens the whole screen whenever it approaches the player, both when charging or fighting the player, but this causes no gameplay difference.
text.es: El nihil de shadow ataca con Distancia, y su ataque especial crea una bomba de sombra similar a la de Nex en la posición del jugador, infligiendo daño rápido y continuo. Los jugadores deben alejarse en cuanto el suelo bajo ellos se oscurezca con una mancha circular. El nihil de shadow oscurece toda la pantalla cada vez que se acerca al jugador, tanto al embestir como al luchar contra él, pero esto no supone ninguna diferencia a nivel de jugabilidad.

text.en: The blood nihil attacks with melee. Its special attack causes all incoming damage to heal it, indicated when the creature lowers its head and begin to glow. It also will passively heal other nihil if it is damaged. Its charge inflicts a bleed similar to Slaughter that begins at 100 damage.
text.es: El nihil de blood ataca cuerpo a cuerpo. Su ataque especial hace que todo el daño recibido lo cure, lo cual se indica cuando la criatura baja la cabeza y empieza a brillar. También cura pasivamente a los demás nihils si recibe daño. Su embestida inflige un sangrado similar a Slaughter que comienza en 100 de daño.

text.en: The ice nihil attacks with Magic, and its special attack applies a six second stun and drains player's Prayer points by 50% of its maximum. Its charge drains the player's Prayer points by 25% of its maximum.
text.es: El nihil de ice ataca con Magia, y su ataque especial aplica un aturdimiento de seis segundos y drena el 50% del máximo de puntos de Oración del jugador. Su embestida drena el 25% del máximo de puntos de Oración del jugador.

text.en: good equipment and a lot of food
a beast of burden and a quick teleport
Attempt to descend the ledge to the north then speak to Zaros.
text.es: Intenta descender por el saliente hacia el norte y luego habla con Zaros.

chatOptions: 5 I've heard all I need to.
2 No, just tell me the crucial info.
2 Yes, allow him in for now.

text.en: If you accept Zaros' help against Mah, he will provide you with full prayer for use with Ancient Curses along the fight and less damage from Mah.
text.es: Si aceptas la ayuda de Zaros contra Mah, él te proporcionará oración completa para usar con Ancient Curses durante el combate, además de reducir el daño que recibes de Mah.

text.en: Defend against monsters while Mah has her nightmare (progress displayed at the top of the screen).
text.es: Defiéndete de los monstruos mientras Mah tiene su pesadilla (el progreso se muestra en la parte superior de la pantalla).

text.en: Use Freedom or Anticipate after Mah clenches her hands to avoid being stunned when she screams in agony (though you will still take damage).
text.es: Usa Freedom o Anticipate después de que Mah cierre sus manos para evitar quedar aturdido cuando grite de agonía (aunque igualmente recibirás daño).

text.en: When the progress is 0%, climb down the ledge next to Mah's hand.
text.es: Cuando el progreso llegue al 0%, desciende por el saliente junto a la mano de Mah.

text.en: Collect The Measure and place it on the ground near faint wisps to activate them for harvesting (wisps can be found on the centre and edges of the cave. After revealing one, it will be a yellow dot on minimap).
text.es: Recoge The Measure y colócalo en el suelo cerca de wisps tenues para activarlos y poder recolectarlos (los wisps se encuentran en el centro y los bordes de la cueva. Al revelar uno, aparecerá como un punto amarillo en el minimapa).

text.en: Convert Mah memories into Mah Energy using the Energy rift. When you gather 250 energy, weave it into a simulacrum (dark to help Zaros, light to hinder Zaros). Hop worlds if you are having trouble finding wisps. You will be outside of the World Gate, enter again using the checkpoint option.
text.es: Convierte los recuerdos de Mah en Mah Energy usando la Energy rift. Cuando reúnas 250 de energía, téjela en un simulacrum (oscuro para ayudar a Zaros, claro para obstaculizar a Zaros). Cambia de mundo si tienes problemas para encontrar wisps. Quedarás fuera del World Gate; entra de nuevo usando la opción de checkpoint.

text.en: Return and speak to Zaros by exiting the rock face on the wall between two hallways (west of the energy rift). Speak to Zaros again after the cutscene.
text.es: Regresa y habla con Zaros saliendo por la pared rocosa entre los dos pasillos (al oeste de la Energy rift). Habla con Zaros de nuevo después de la escena cinemática.

text.en: Talk to Azzanadra through the world gate.
text.es: Habla con Azzanadra a través del world gate.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
